AUTO mode. High confidence on NEW concept (social-friction). UPDATEs are conservative diff proposals. Skip Stage 4; proceed to Stage 4.5 validation.
Pass 1: 3 findings (2 broken_wikilinks resolved by workbench rename to perry-social-friction-2026; 1 missing_related cognitive-offloading added). Pass 2: 0 findings.
